hero.backgroundAlt: A row of electric scooters parked in the city
hero.title: Own an asset that generates daily income without operations or complexity
hero.description: Simply put, you own an income-generating asset while we fully handle operations and maintenance.
hero.benefits: Start earning daily returns with low upfront investment and build a steady recurring income stream.

passiveIncome.title: Imagine earning daily income without operating it?
passiveIncome.description: Every scooter and every bike you own through EV Share works for you every day, creating steady income. While people keep using transport, your earnings keep growing. No management, no operation, no complexity. You own the asset and we handle the rest.

chooseAsset.title: Choose the right asset for you
chooseAsset.descriptionStart: EV Share provides a portfolio of modern technical assets
chooseAsset.descriptionEnd: designed to generate consistent income through a smart, advanced operating system.

car.title: Cars
car.description: A strong long-term asset that delivers stable income and returns.

scooter.title: Electric Scooters
scooter.description: A smart asset at a suitable cost, highly demanded in cities.

bike.title: Smart Bikes
bike.description: A practical and excellent investment choice for daily commuting.

items.item1: Full asset management through an advanced control dashboard.
items.item3: Multiple operating options with trusted partners.
items.item4: An asset that is fully yours, without operating hassle.

step1.title: Subscribe to the platform
step1.body:
only SAR 399 for lifetime and download the app.
Get instant access to all assets and your full investor dashboard.

step2.title: Choose from available assets
step2.body:
Select from electric scooters and smart bikes.
Each asset appears with full performance details inside the EV Share operating platform.

step3.title: Choose operation mode
step3.body:
EV Share offers a complete, modern system with flexible operation models.
Own and let us operate, or choose your preferred mode within EV Share.

step4.title: Start tracking your profits
step4.body:
After operation starts, your assets begin generating daily income.
Monitor income, expenses, and net returns clearly from one dashboard.

profitCta.title: Start generating profits today
profitCta.subtitle: Own your assets, and keep tracking your returns

PrivacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicyPage.introBody: EV Share respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information. This policy explains what we collect, why we collect it, and how we use and protect it.
PrivacyPolicyPage.collectionBody: We may collect account details (name, phone, email), identity verification details, payment details, and platform usage data such as device information, activity logs, and preferences.
PrivacyPolicyPage.useBody: We use information to create and manage your account, process transactions, provide platform services, improve user experience, communicate updates, and comply with legal obligations.
PrivacyPolicyPage.sharingBody: We do not sell personal data. We may share data with trusted service providers, payment partners, compliance partners, and authorities when legally required.
PrivacyPolicyPage.securityBody: We apply reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to protect your data. We retain personal information only as long as needed for service delivery, legal compliance, and dispute resolution.
PrivacyPolicyPage.rightsBody: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your information where permitted by law. You may also request restriction of processing or object to specific uses.
PrivacyPolicyPage.contactBody: For privacy requests, contact us at support@evshare.sa.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.scopeBody: These terms govern your access to and use of EV Share services, applications, and related platform features.
TermsPage.accountBody:
You are responsible for keeping your account credentials secure and for all actions under your account.
You must provide accurate and up-to-date information.
TermsPage.investmentBody:
Asset availability, performance indicators, and operation models are presented through the platform.
Returns are subject to operational and market conditions.
TermsPage.liabilityBody:
EV Share provides services on a best-effort basis and does not guarantee uninterrupted availability.
To the extent allowed by law, EV Share is not liable for indirect or consequential damages.
TermsPage.changesBody: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after updates means acceptance of the revised terms.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.description: We are happy to help with any question about your account, assets, platform access, or operations.
ContactPage.hoursValue: Sunday to Thursday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM

CarPage.title: Cars Investment
CarPage.intro: Cars are one of the most stable long-term assets in smart urban mobility.
CarPage.body1: Through EV Share, your vehicle is managed with a clear operation model and continuous monitoring from one dashboard.
CarPage.body2: This option suits investors looking for balanced growth, operational clarity, and recurring monthly performance.
CarPage.point3: Smart tracking through EV Share platform
CarPage.point4: Flexible investment visibility in one place

ScooterPage.title: Electric Scooters
ScooterPage.intro: Electric scooters provide fast turnover and high demand inside dense city zones.
ScooterPage.body1: The EV Share operating model is built to maximize daily utilization while maintaining asset quality and uptime.
ScooterPage.body2: This option is ideal for investors who prefer practical entry cost and strong day-to-day movement.

BikePage.title: Smart Bikes
BikePage.intro: Smart bikes combine practical commuting value with attractive operating flexibility.
BikePage.body1: They are suitable for daily trips and can maintain healthy usage rates with a sustainable operation pattern.
BikePage.body2: For investors, this model offers a balanced route between affordability, demand, and recurring returns.
BikePage.point1: Practical fit for daily urban transport

AboutPage.title: Who we are
AboutPage.paragraph1: EV Share is a simple, smart mobility platform that links merchants with operation-ready assets, while giving investors clear access to practical opportunities in city transport.
AboutPage.paragraph2: Our mission is to make daily mobility operation practical and seamless, by delivering short-distance transport solutions with transparent service and clear reach.
